{"society_power": 9.5, "state_power": 10.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "WWI mobilization, People's Budget, 1918 mass suffrage", "reasoning": "Wartime controls (DORA, conscription, munitions), progressive taxation, and the nascent welfare state pushed state capacity to near-total penetration, while society\u2014already dominant\u2014expanded via unions and the 1918 franchise but was already at the ceiling of the rubric."}
